add-task.detail: Tasks have no date. Reminders are anything with a date (one-off, or recurring and fixed).

add-lead.detail: Leads are inquiries that haven't become clients yet.

add-project.detail: Projects group clients and tasks under one shared goal.

add-goal.detail: Goals help make sure you're moving at your own pace and in your own direction.

add-transaction.detail: Every income or expense you log feeds into your financial picture.

add-meeting.detail: Calendar meetings sync with your clients and show up in the reminders on your home screen.

moon.title: Overview
moon.body: A quick look at how your goals are progressing. Tap to see each goal on its own — and jump to the full screen.

insights.title: Daily questions
insights.body: These are the questions you chose. You can track your answers over time on the "How are you today" screen, and link new questions to goals on the Goals screen.

quick-row.title: Quick add
quick-row.body: Quick add is a shortcut to all the add buttons (tasks, income, leads…). "Update goal" lets you quickly update goals that need manual input.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.body: Confirming meetings that took place, payments that should arrive, calendar duplicates — and other things you don't want to slip through the cracks.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.body: Recurring tasks, or anything you want to remind yourself of every so often.

next-tasks.title: Tasks
next-tasks.body: Your urgent tasks show up here.

chips.title: Status cards
chips.body: A focused, personalized view — tap here to open a menu and customize it.

tabs.title: Client status
tabs.body: Active, in-between, and former are the three top-level buckets, and within each you can define as many statuses as you like.

groupby.title: Group by
groupby.body: You can view your clients by status, by project, by balance — however you like.

hero.title: Quick summary
hero.body: A general summary — "Monthly" shows this month's picture, and "Cumulative" shows everything from the start.

select.title: Multi-select
select.body: You can select several clients at once to change their status together, or delete them in one go.

add.title: Add client
add.body: This is where you add a new client.

view.title: Tasks and reminders
view.body: Tasks have no date. Reminders are anything with a date (one-off, or recurring and fixed) — switch between them here.

add.title: Add
add.body: This is where you add a new task or reminder.

toggle.title: Leads and statuses
toggle.body: "Leads" shows your leads in columns by their status. On the Statuses screen you can edit and add the different statuses for your leads.

stats.title: Snapshot
stats.body: How many inquiries came in this month, how many became clients, and what your conversion rate is.

board.title: Leads board
board.body: You can drag a lead from column to column to update where it stands.

add.title: New lead
add.body: This is where you add a new lead.

hero.title: Projects summary
hero.body: A general summary — "Monthly" shows this month, "Cumulative" from the start.

list.title: Project cards
list.body: Each panel brings together the groups, clients, income, and tasks that belong to that project.

add.title: New project
add.body: This is where you start a new project.

chart.title: Cumulative income
chart.body: The line builds day by day against the monthly income target (the dashed line). That's how you see if the pace holds.

breakdown.title: From where, to where
breakdown.body: Income by project and expenses by category — where the money comes from and where it goes.

recurring.title: Recurring templates
recurring.body: Transactions that recur every month or week. Set it up once and the system creates them on its own — you just need to approve.

list.title: Transactions
list.body: All the transactions from this month. Ones awaiting approval are marked separately.

add.title: New transaction
add.body: This is where you add income or an expense.
